findings.title: Verdict contradicted by the immediately preceding tool result
evidence: preceding result: 'Traceback: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named foo'
findings.recommended_action: Withdraw or re-qualify the verdict; the receipt shows an error/not-found, not success.
findings.rationale: Highest-confidence finding: the cited receipt refutes the claim.

findings.title: Confident verdict without a supporting tool receipt
evidence: verdict phrase: 'Root Cause: the env var was unset. Fixed. Verified.'
findings.recommended_action: Run the discriminating tool call before asserting the verdict, or hedge the claim (likely/probably).
findings.rationale: Claim-Verification rule requires a tool call in the recent window for any Root Cause / Fixed / Verified class claim.

findings.title: Confident verdict without a supporting tool receipt
findings.recommended_action: Run the discriminating tool call before asserting the verdict, or hedge the claim (likely/probably).
findings.rationale: Claim-Verification rule requires a tool call in the recent window for any Root Cause / Fixed / Verified class claim.

findings.title: Confident verdict without a supporting tool receipt
findings.recommended_action: Run the discriminating tool call before asserting the verdict, or hedge the claim (likely/probably).
findings.rationale: Claim-Verification rule requires a tool call in the recent window for any Root Cause / Fixed / Verified class claim.

findings.title: Confident verdict without a supporting tool receipt
findings.recommended_action: Run the discriminating tool call before asserting the verdict, or hedge the claim (likely/probably).
findings.rationale: Claim-Verification rule requires a tool call in the recent window for any Root Cause / Fixed / Verified class claim.

findings.title: Gate-class hook never blocks (rca_gate: 6 invocations, 0 blocks)
findings.recommended_action: Confirm the gate is fail-closed where it should be; a never-blocking gate may be warn-mode or fail-open.
findings.rationale: A blocking gate that never blocks is either inert or permissive.

findings.title: Hook error-dominated (broken_hook: 6/6 errors)
findings.recommended_action: Inspect hook stderr; an erroring hook may be fail-open.
findings.rationale: Hooks that error over half the time are likely not enforcing.

findings.title: Recurring error signature across 2 transcripts
findings.recommended_action: Add a replay test that reproduces this signature.
findings.rationale: Recurring identical errors are prime regression-test material.
findings.proposed_test: Fixture a transcript/tool_result containing: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named foo and assert the responsible code path raises (or no longer raises) it.

findings.title: Negative-existence claim without a search tool receipt
evidence: claim: 'he helper is unused, so I removed it. ModuleNotFoundError:'
findings.recommended_action: Back the claim with Grep/Glob/Read evidence before asserting absence.
findings.rationale: Absence claims need a positive search, not inference.

findings.title: Registered hook with zero recent invocations: inert_ghost_Stop.py
evidence: registered in hooks.json/settings.json, absent from diagnostics
findings.recommended_action: Confirm the hook is wired and firing; it may be inert.
findings.rationale: A gate that never fires provides no protection - verify liveness.

findings.title: Health check [cks] flipped healthy to critical 2 times
findings.recommended_action: Stabilize the check or its underlying subsystem.
findings.rationale: Intermittent health flips indicate a flaky/regressing condition.

findings.title: Pattern [verdict-without-receipt] recurs across 1 source(s)
findings.recommended_action: Consider graduating this into a deterministic runtime gate (conservative; gate should warn before block in production).
findings.rationale: Meets recurrence bar; remaining promotion criteria need a replay pass.
findings.proposed_test: Fixture: assistant turn with a Root Cause verdict and no preceding tool_use triggers the gate.
findings.proposed_runtime_gate: Stop hook: regex-match verdict phrases (Root Cause/Fixed/Verified/Resolved) and require a tool_use event in the preceding window; warn-first.

findings.title: Pattern [receipts] recurs across 1 source(s)
findings.recommended_action: Consider graduating this into a deterministic runtime gate (conservative; gate should warn before block in production).
findings.rationale: Meets recurrence bar; remaining promotion criteria need a replay pass.
findings.proposed_test: Fixture: reproduce the pattern and assert the gate fires.
findings.proposed_runtime_gate: Stop hook: detect this recurring pattern and require supporting evidence; warn-first.

findings.title: Pattern [negative-existence-without-search] recurs across 1 source(s)
findings.recommended_action: Consider graduating this into a deterministic runtime gate (conservative; gate should warn before block in production).
findings.rationale: Meets recurrence bar; remaining promotion criteria need a replay pass.
findings.proposed_test: Fixture: an absence claim with no preceding search tool triggers the gate.
findings.proposed_runtime_gate: PreToolUse/Stop hook: on absence claims require a Grep/Glob/Read in the same turn; warn-first.

recommended_actions: Triage 1 critical finding(s) first - each ships with explicit evidence refs.
Review 7 high-severity finding(s); reproduce before acting.
Evaluate 3 promotion candidate(s); replay-test before graduating to a runtime gate.
